summary: The diff only modifies project_state.json to record the revert task as 'pending'. No actual frontend files were changed — no components, CSS, Tailwind config, or animations were reverted to Version 44 state.

missing_requirements.requirement: Fully revert the entire frontend to its Version 44 state — restore all component styles, animations, CSS custom properties, Tailwind configuration, and layout settings exactly as they were in Version 44.
missing_requirements.reason: No frontend files were modified in the diff. The task is marked 'pending' in project_state.json, meaning no actual revert was performed. Components (HeroSection, Navbar, AboutSection, RosterSection, NewsSection, Footer, etc.), index.css, src/index.css, and tailwind.config.js were not touched.
